prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025 年物理类（含旧高考理科）最低位次约 22492→22709→20187→22348，近四年整体在 2 万–2.3 万之间波动，2025 年基准约 22348 名。2024 年因新高考首年分组细化，位次短暂前移至 20187，2025 年回弹至 22348，整体呈震荡格局；该校在江西省物理类（理科）招生计划 2022–2023 年均为 34 人，2024 年减至 28 人，2025 年回升至 31 人；2026 年计划大幅扩至 49 人，较 2025 年增加 18 人（+58%），扩招幅度显著，竞争压力明显缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年第 77 名，近年稳定在 72–81 名区间，属中上水平 211；2024 年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件），2026 年声誉数据中未见福州大学；抖音热度排名第 88（一般），综合热度约 22 万，曝光度中等偏低；无投档断档历史记录；第五轮学科评估中化学获评 A-，为该校唯一 A- 及以上学科，与材料科学与工程、药学等招生专业关联紧密；其余工科专业（电气、机械、数据科学等）未单独评级。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、数据科学与 大数据技术、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度偏热/高热推荐；材料科学与工程、安全工程等热度一般；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 26.78 万人（按近年比例估算），较 2025 年 26.64 万人略增约 0.5%，竞争基数微升；福州大学位于福建省（邻省），对本省考生有一定地域辐射；university_enrollment_summary 中江西省招生占比约 3.3%（2025 年），属中等偏下水平，非该校主要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 22348、2026 年大幅扩招 58%（竞争显著缓解）、本省考生微增 0.5%（小幅抵消扩招效应）、学校层次稳定（211/软科 77）、声誉热度一般等关键因素，扩招是影响 2026 年录取位次的最主要因素，预计最低位次较 2025 年明显后移（数字增大），预测最低位次约 29932 名，区间 29432–30432 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including old Gaokao Science) was approximately 22492→22709→20187→22348, fluctuating between 20,000 and 23,000 over the past four years, with a baseline of about 22348 in 2025. In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao with refined groupings, the ranking briefly moved forward to 20187, then rebounded to 22348 in 2025, showing an oscillating pattern; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category (Science) in Jiangxi was 34 students in both 2022 and 2023, reduced to 28 in 2024, and increased back to 31 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 49 students, an increase of 18 students (+58%) compared to 2025, with a notable expansion rate, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 77th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 72–81 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the 2024 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (campus safety incident), and Fuzhou University was not seen in the 2026 reputation data; Douyin popularity ranking 88th (average), with a comprehensive popularity of about 220,000, medium-low exposure; no record of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, closely related to enrollment majors such as Materials Science and Engineering and Pharmacy; other engineering majors (Electrical, Mechanical, Data Science, etc.) have not been individually rated.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Data Science and Big Data Technology, and Electronic Information/Communication are socially hot/highly recommended; Materials Science and Engineering, Safety Engineering, etc., have average popularity; the province's 2026 Physics Category examinees are approximately 267,800 (estimated based on recent proportions), a slight increase of about 0.5% from 266,400 in 2025, with a slight rise in the competition base; Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province (neighboring province), with some regional radiation to local examinees; in the university_enrollment_summary, the enrollment proportion in Jiangxi is about 3.3% (2025), at a medium-low level, not the university's main source of students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 22348, the significant 58% enrollment expansion in 2026 (competition significantly eased), a slight 0.5% increase in local examinees (slightly offsetting the expansion effect), stable university level (211/Soft Science 77), and average reputation and popularity, the expansion is the most important factor affecting the 2026 admission ranking. It is expected that the minimum ranking will significantly move backward (number increases) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 29932, in the range of 29432–30432.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category significantly expands enrollment to 49 students, with the expected minimum ranking moving backward to about 29932, in the range of 29432–30432. Candidates with rankings in this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, with Tier 1 popular majors as a reach, and Tier 3 Fujian-Taiwan cooperation projects as a safety net; those with rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 29000) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors like Electrical and Data Science; those with rankings near the upper bound (e.g., beyond 30000) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 and Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

The university's enrollment plan for History Category (liberal arts) in Jiangxi Province has been consistently 4 students for five consecutive years from 2022 to 2026, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 77th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 72–81 range in recent years; reputation evaluation in 2024 was somewhat negative (campus safety incident), but no data for Fuzhou University in 2026 reputation data; Douyin popularity ranking 88th (average), comprehensive popularity about 220,000; no history of enrollment gaps; Chemistry A- is the only A- or above discipline, but History Category only offers Accounting, which has no direct connection to Chemistry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Accounting social popularity in 2024 was assessed as recommended (somewhat hot), with a clear warming trend in 2023, but the overall accounting/finance/audit field shows a differentiated and wait-and-see attitude; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in the province is about 207,100 (estimated based on recent proportions), a slight increase of about 0.5% from 206,100 in 2025, with a slight rise in competition base; Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province (neighboring province), with some regional influence on local examinees; in the university_enrollment_summary, the enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province is about 3.3% (2025), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering key factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1635, a five-year flat enrollment plan (no expansion or reduction), a slight increase of 0.5% in local History Category examinees (slightly intensified competition), stable university level, and somewhat hot Accounting major, under the background of unchanged plan and slightly increased examinees, the minimum ranking is expected to shift slightly backward (number slightly larger), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1655, range 1357–1953.
